example_queries: What is the average claim amount by product line in Q1 2025?
Show claims volume by month for Lesotho vs Botswana
What was the lapse rate for funeral products in Botswana Q1 by channel?
How many clients downgraded Multiply tiers in the last 90 days?

claims_master.description: One row per claim lodged across all Guardrisk cells and Momentum/Metropolitan products. The core claims transaction table.

columns.cell: Guardrisk industry cell, e.g. Motor Cell, Agri Cell

claims_by_cell.description: Pre-aggregated monthly claims volume and value per Guardrisk cell and market. Use for cell/market trend questions.

fraud_flags.description: Fraud Risk Score and two-layer verdict (Isolation Forest + Graph Analytics) per claim, joins to claims_master on claim_id.

columns.layer1a_verdict: Isolation Forest verdict: Clean/Amber/Red style tier
columns.layer1b_verdict: Graph ring verdict: Clear / Suspected / Confirmed

triage_outcomes.description: What actually happened to each claim after triage: outcome and turnaround time. Joins to claims_master / fraud_flags on claim_id.

policy_master.description: One row per policy: the master book of business across all markets, products and channels.

columns.client_id: client who owns the policy (a client may hold several policies)
columns.channel: Tied Advisor / Independent Broker / Bancassurance / Direct Digital

lapse_events.description: One row per policy that lapsed, with reason. To compute a lapse RATE for a segment, join against policy_master (denominator = all policies in the segment, numerator = matching rows here).

columns.channel: Tied Advisor / Independent Broker / Bancassurance / Direct Digital
columns.reason: Affordability / Non-payment / Dissatisfaction / Switched provider / Other

new_business.description: Policies issued (new business) in the trailing 24 months.

columns.channel: Tied Advisor / Independent Broker / Bancassurance / Direct Digital

premium_history.description: Monthly premium due/paid per policy for the trailing 6 months. Use for persistency and on-time payment questions.

multiply_engagement.description: Monthly Multiply wellness engagement score per client for the trailing 6 months.

active_dayz.description: Monthly Active Dayz and Recharge Dayz (sleep) per client for the trailing 6 months.

tier_history.description: Multiply tier change events per client (upgrade or downgrade).

reward_redemptions.description: Partner reward redemption events per client.

advisor_performance.description: Monthly KPIs per advisor for the trailing 6 months: lead volumes, contact rate, conversion rate, speed to contact.

columns.avg_hours_to_first_contact: average speed to first contact, in hours

lead_pipeline.description: Individual leads moving through the sales funnel.

columns.stage: New / Contacted / Meeting / Proposal / Closed Won / Closed Lost

conversion_rates.description: Monthly conversion rate per advisor per product line.

territory_data.description: Territory-level rollup: advisor headcount, total leads and total conversions.

columns.advisor_count: number of advisors in the territory
columns.total_conversions: total closed-won leads in the territory
